Let's talk about the mechanics of a deal. Now that you're clear on why apartments, it's time to unpack the how of it all specifically, the mechanics of a good deal. Look, not all deals are equal. You can lose money on deals. I know people that have lost money. I know people that have gone bankrupt in real estate. But I want to explain to you how they went bankrupt. And I want to show you more importantly, the deals that will 99.99% of the time guarantee you don't lose money, provide you with cash flow, and as long as you have time on your side will provide you with appreciation over the long term. By understanding all the terms and what constitutes a quality investing opportunity, you'll be better positioned to hit the ground running with confidence and certainty, spotting the best deals in your marketplace. And when you see one, knowing how to take advantage of it. That's the goal to make you savvier, confident, a confident real estate investor, certain of the information they have, their due diligence, their values, the valuation, and the future. If you can achieve this, you will make money in real estate as long as you have cash flow and time in a good location. And then you add some scale, you're talking financial freedom.
